This should be a http://www.example.com/ link. This should be a [email removed] link. As should [email removed] this. As should [email removed] this. As should CSS@example.com this. Another ampersand http://www.example.com/?doit&x=y link. More entities http://www.example.com/?doit&x="y&z=y.

Autolink with underscore: http://www.example.com/with_under_score
